gigapan.description:
[embarrased I can't remember her name :-(]

I set up a little portrait studio in the back of the Burning Man
Earth booth at SF Decompression, 2010.

The studio is shown here:
http://gigapan.org/gigapans/61976/

The gigapan portrait images were taken with a gigapan epic pro, and  16-40
images from a Canon T2i - An 18 megapixel Digital SLR.  I used the 55mm
lens - which has a 86.5 mm 35mm equivalent.
    
Other GigaPans from the event are (or are going to be) at
http://gigapan.org/gigapans/tag/decom2010/most_popular/
    
I also have photos on flickr from the event at:
http://www.flickr.com/search/?q=decom2010&w=41715395@N00
